title: 4WD Waterproof Remote Control Car，Amphibious 2.4 GHz RC Cars Remote Control Boat，360°Rotation RC Stunt Car with LED Lights，Boys Girls Gifts All Terrain Water Beach Pool Toy (LY-016)
features: Full Waterproof: This remote control car is specially designed with a comprehensive waterproof function. It can easily handle various terrains such as beaches, grasslands, muddy paths, and pools, bringing endless driving pleasure

Exquisitely Manufactured: We have carefully designed and strictly tested every detail of this RC car to ensure it has excellent durability and stability. High-quality materials are selected, which can effectively resist wear and impact in daily use and extend its service life

Powerful Performance: Equipped with a high-efficiency motor, it provides strong driving force, enabling the RC stunt car to sprint quickly. On land, it supports 360-degree rotation and 180-degree reversal, realizing bidirectional driving. In the water, it can also rotate 360 degrees. This unique design makes the driving experience more abundant, and it can easily handle both straight-line racing and complex obstacles

Multiplayer Game: Adopting 2.4GHz remote control technology, it supports multiple of our remote control cars to run simultaneously, suitable for family gatherings or competitions among friends. The body is equipped with cool LED lights, which are not only beautiful but also improve nighttime visibility, making playing with remote control cars more exciting

Fun Gift: This 4WD waterproof remote control car is an interesting gift for children over 4 years old. The remote control is designed simply with few buttons and intuitive operation, so children can easily get started. Whether it's a family gathering or an outdoor activity, it can bring endless joy and excitement
